ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "fuel" TEXT /* Fuel used in the project */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Market sector of the project */,
  "technology_prime_mover" TEXT /* Technology and prime mover used in the project */,
  "thermal_energy_use" TEXT /* Thermal energy use of the project */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile of the project */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is located */,
  "chp_tap" TEXT /* CHP TAP of the project */,
  "system_size" INTEGER /* System size of the project */,
  "year_installed" INTEGER /* Year the project was installed */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code of the project */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the project */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment about the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the project location */,
  "project_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the project */,
  "energy_output" TEXT /* Energy output of the project */,
  "installation_company" TEXT /* Company that installed the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the project data was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of who created the project entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of who last updated the project entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_naics_code FOREIGN KEY ("naics_code") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each NAICS code */,
  "naics_code" TEXT /* NAICS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS code */,
  "industry_category" TEXT /* Industry category of the NAICS code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the NAICS code entry was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of who created the NAICS code entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of who last updated the NAICS code entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_naics_codes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_naics_codes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Technology and prime mover used in the project
Thermal energy use of the project
City where the project is located
State where the project is located
Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the project location
Last time the project data was updated
